```{r}
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2017$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2017$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2017$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2017$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2017$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2017[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2017[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2017[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2017[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2018

pdf(paste0("Año-2018/Evolución-Dependientes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))


evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Domicilio.",
                     col = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                             "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2018$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2018$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2018[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2018[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2018[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2018[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2019

pdf(paste0("Año-2019/Evolución-Dependientes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))


evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Domicilio.",
                     col = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                             "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2019$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2019$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2019[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2019[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2019[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2019[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2020

pdf(paste0("Año-2020/Evolución-Dependientes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))


evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Domicilio.",
                     col = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                             "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2020$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2020$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2020[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2020[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2020[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2020[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")
dev.off()

### AÑO 2021

pdf(paste0("Año-2021/Evolución-Dependientes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))


evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Domicilio.",
                     col = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                             "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2021$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2021$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2021[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2021[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2021[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2021[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")
dev.off()

### AÑO 2022

pdf(paste0("Año-2022/Evolución-Dependientes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))


evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Domicilio.",
                     col = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                             "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2022$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2022$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2022[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2022[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2022[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2022[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2023

pdf(paste0("Año-2023/Evolución-Dependientes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))


evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Domicilio.",
                     col = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                             "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2023$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2023$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2023[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2023[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2023[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2023[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2024

pdf(paste0("Año-2024/Evolución-Dependientes", ".pdf"), width = 11, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))


evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Domicilio.",
                     col = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                             "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Atención Residencial.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                             "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"))

evolucion.temporal.2(vec1 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Hombre-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Hombre-Grado.I`,
                     vec2 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Hombre-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Hombre-Grado.II`,
                     vec3 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Hombre-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Hombre-Grado.III`,
                     vec4 = supervivientes.domicilio.2024$`Mujer-Grado.I` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.I`,
                     vec5 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.II` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.II`,
                     vec6 = supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.III` +
                       supervivientes.residencial.2024$`Mujer-Grado.III`,
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,20000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Evolución del número de personas dependientes según grados y sexo.",
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.",
                     col = c("royalblue1","royalblue3","royalblue4",
                             "green", "green3","green4"))

evolucion.temporal.3(vec1 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2024[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec2 = rowSums(supervivientes.residencial.2024[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec3 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2024[, c(2:4)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     vec4 = rowSums(supervivientes.domicilio.2024[, c(5:7)], na.rm = TRUE),
                     rango.edades = 0:115,
                     ylimite = c(0,50000),
                     TITL = "Figura X.X. Número de personas dependientes según tipo de atención y sexo.",
                     col = c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","cornflowerblue","darkolivegreen1"),
                     subtl = "Edad: Todas las edades. Tipo de Atención: Dependientes.")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2025


```

#### EVOLUCIÓN DE LAS TBM

**GRÁFICAS TBM**

```{r}

# Leyenda colores

# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue" 
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "cornflowerblue"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "blue"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "darkblue"
# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse"
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen1"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen3"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen"


col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen")


### AÑO 2017

pdf(paste0("Año-2017/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2017, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"),
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2017, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2017, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2017, 
                col = col, 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2017[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2017[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2017[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2017[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2017[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2017, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2017,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2017, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2017,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2017, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2017,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2017, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2018

pdf(paste0("Año-2018/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2018, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2018, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM.residencial.2018, TBM.domicilio.2018, 
                col = col, Indtitl = "TBM", y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2018[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2018[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2018[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2018[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2018[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2018, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2018,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2018, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2018,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2018, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2018,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2018, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2019

pdf(paste0("Año-2019/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2019, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2019, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM.residencial.2019, TBM.domicilio.2019, 
                col = col, Indtitl = "TBM", y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2019[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2019[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2019[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2019[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2019[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2019, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2019,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2019, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2019,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2019, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2019,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2019, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2020

pdf(paste0("Año-2020/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2020, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"),
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2020, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM.residencial.2020, TBM.domicilio.2020, 
                col = col, Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2020[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2020[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2020[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2020[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2020[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2020, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2020,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2020, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2020,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2020, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2020,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2020, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2021

pdf(paste0("Año-2021/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2021, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2021, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM.residencial.2021, TBM.domicilio.2021, 
                col = col, Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2021[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2021[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2021[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2021[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2021[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2021, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2021,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2021, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2021,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2021, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2021,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2021, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2022

pdf(paste0("Año-2022/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2022, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2022, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM.residencial.2022, TBM.domicilio.2022, 
                col = col, Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2022[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2022[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2022[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2022[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2022[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2022, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2022,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2022, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2022,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2022, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2022,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2022, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2023  

pdf(paste0("Año-2023/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2023, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2023, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"),
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM.residencial.2023, TBM.domicilio.2023, 
                col = col, Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2023[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2023[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2023[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2023[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2023[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2023, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2023,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2023, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2023,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2023, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2023,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2023, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2024

pdf(paste0("Año-2024/Gráficas-TBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.residencial.2024, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2024, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              Indtitl = "TBM",
              y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2024,
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2024, 
                col = col, 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.3(TBM = TBM.INE.2024[, c(2,3)], 
                TBM.log = df.INE.2024[, c(4,5)], 
                TBM.pred.HP = df.INE.2024[, c(6,7)], 
                TBM.pred.Gmp = df.INE.2024[, c(16,17)], 
                TBM.pred.GM = df.INE.2024[, c(26,27)], 
                rango.edad = 0:115, 
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85, 
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink", 
                        "purple", "black"))

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.residencial.2024, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2024,
                col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4", "red"), 
                col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.4(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2024, 
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2024,
                col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue", "red"), 
                col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen", "orange"), 
                tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
                Indtitl = "TBM", 
                y.axis1 = 1)

evolucion.TBM.5(TBM1 = TBM.residencial.2024, 
                TBM2 = TBM.domicilio.2024,
                TBM.INE = TBM.INE.2024, 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                        "red", "orange"), 
                Indtitl = "TBM",
                y.axis1 = 1)


dev.off()

### AÑO 2025 - DATOS DEFUNCIONES NO DISPONIBLES


```

**GRÁFICAS log(TBM)**

```{r}

# Leyenda colores

# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue" 
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "cornflowerblue"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "blue"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "darkblue"
# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse"
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen1"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen3"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen"

col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen")

### AÑO 2017

pdf(paste0("Año-2017/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2017 = TBM.residencial.2017
logTBM.residencial.2017 = log(logTBM.residencial.2017[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2017 = TBM.domicilio.2017
logTBM.domicilio.2017 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2017[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2017, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"),
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = TBM.domicilio.2017, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio",
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(TBM.residencial.2017, TBM.domicilio.2017, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2018

pdf(paste0("Año-2018/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2018 = TBM.residencial.2018
logTBM.residencial.2018 = log(logTBM.residencial.2018[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2018 = TBM.domicilio.2018
logTBM.domicilio.2018 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2018[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2018, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"),
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.domicilio.2018, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(logTBM.residencial.2018, logTBM.domicilio.2018, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2019

pdf(paste0("Año-2019/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2019 = TBM.residencial.2019
logTBM.residencial.2019 = log(logTBM.residencial.2019[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2019 = TBM.domicilio.2019
logTBM.domicilio.2019 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2019[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2019, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"),
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.domicilio.2019, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(logTBM.residencial.2019, logTBM.domicilio.2019, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2020

pdf(paste0("Año-2020/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2020 = TBM.residencial.2020
logTBM.residencial.2020 = log(logTBM.residencial.2020[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2020 = TBM.domicilio.2020
logTBM.domicilio.2020 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2020[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2020, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6),
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.domicilio.2020, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"),
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(logTBM.residencial.2020, logTBM.domicilio.2020, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2021

pdf(paste0("Año-2021/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2021 = TBM.residencial.2021
logTBM.residencial.2021 = log(logTBM.residencial.2021[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2021 = TBM.domicilio.2021
logTBM.domicilio.2021 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2021[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2021, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.domicilio.2021, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(logTBM.residencial.2021, logTBM.domicilio.2021, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2022

pdf(paste0("Año-2022/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2022 = TBM.residencial.2022
logTBM.residencial.2022 = log(logTBM.residencial.2022[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2022 = TBM.domicilio.2022
logTBM.domicilio.2022 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2022[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2022, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"),
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6),
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.domicilio.2022, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio",
              ylimite = c(-6,6),
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(logTBM.residencial.2022, logTBM.domicilio.2022, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2023  

pdf(paste0("Año-2023/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2023 = TBM.residencial.2023
logTBM.residencial.2023 = log(logTBM.residencial.2023[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2023 = TBM.domicilio.2023
logTBM.domicilio.2023 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2023[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2023, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"),
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.domicilio.2023,
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"),
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio",
              ylimite = c(-6,6), 
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(logTBM.residencial.2023, logTBM.domicilio.2023, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2024

pdf(paste0("Año-2024/Gráficas-logTBM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

logTBM.residencial.2024 = TBM.residencial.2024
logTBM.residencial.2024 = log(logTBM.residencial.2024[, 2:7])

logTBM.domicilio.2024 = TBM.domicilio.2024
logTBM.domicilio.2024 = log(logTBM.domicilio.2024[, 2:7])

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.residencial.2024, 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"),
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6),
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.1(TBM = logTBM.domicilio.2024, 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              tipo.atencion = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(-6,6),
              Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

evolucion.TBM.2(logTBM.residencial.2024, logTBM.domicilio.2024, 
                col = col, ylimite = c(-6,6), Indtitl = "log(TBM)",
              x.axis1 = 0)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2025 - DATOS DEFUNCIONES NO DISPONIBLES



```

#### EVOLUCIÓN DE LAS ESPERANZAS DE VIDA

##### HELIGMAN-POLLARD

```{r}

# Leyenda colores

# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue" 
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "cornflowerblue"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "blue"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "darkblue"
# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse"
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen1"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen3"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen"

col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen")



### AÑO 2017

pdf(paste0("Año-2017/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2018

pdf(paste0("Año-2018/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2019

pdf(paste0("Año-2019/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],  
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

dev.off()


### AÑO 2020

pdf(paste0("Año-2020/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2021

pdf(paste0("Año-2021/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2022

pdf(paste0("Año-2022/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")


dev.off()

### AÑO 2023  

pdf(paste0("Año-2023/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))
```
