```{r}
evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2024

pdf(paste0("Año-2024/Gráficas-ESP-HP", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.1(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")

evolucion.ESP.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada (Heligman & Pollard)")



dev.off()

### AÑO 2025 - DATOS DEFUNCIONES NO DISPONIBLES

```

##### GOMPERTZ + GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM

```{r}

# Leyenda colores

# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue" 
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "deepskyblue4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Residencial) : "cornflowerblue"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Residencial) : "blue"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Residencial) : "darkblue"
# Hombre-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse"
# Hombre-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse3"
# Hombre-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "chartreuse4"
# Mujer-Grado.I (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen1"
# Mujer-Grado.II (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen3"
# Mujer-Grado.III (Atención Domicilio) : "darkolivegreen"

col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen")

### AÑO 2017

pdf(paste0("Año-2017/Gráficas-ESP-Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
              ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2018

pdf(paste0("Año-2018/Gráficas-ESP-Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2019

pdf(paste0("Año-2019/GráficasESP--Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()


### AÑO 2020

pdf(paste0("Año-2020/Gráficas-ESP-Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2021

pdf(paste0("Año-2021/Gráficas-ESP-Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2022

pdf(paste0("Año-2022/Gráficas-ESP-Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2023  

pdf(paste0("Año-2023/Gráficas-ESP-Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2024

pdf(paste0("Año-2024/Gráficas-ESP-Gmp-GM", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.residencial.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4"), 
              col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.3(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
              col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue"), 
              col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"), 
              Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
              ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

evolucion.ESP.4(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                        "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                        "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                        "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen"),
                ylimite = c(0,100),
                ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
              tipo.esp = "Ajustada",
              rango.edades = 35:100)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2025 - DATOS DEFUNCIONES NO DISPONIBLES

```

#### COMPARACIÓN DE LOS AJUSTES

```{r}

# Leyenda colores

# Ajuste Helligman-Pollard :  
# Gompertz : 
# Gompertz-Makeham : 
# Sin ajuste : 


### AÑO 2017

pdf(paste0("Año-2017/Gráficas-ESP-ComparativaAjustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 7)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2017)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2017)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2018

pdf(paste0("Año-2018/Gráficas-ESP-ComparativaAjustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2018)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2018)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2019

pdf(paste0("Año-2019/Gráficas-ESP-ComparativaAjustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2019)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2019)

dev.off()


### AÑO 2020

pdf(paste0("Año-2020/Gráficas-ESP-ComparativaAjustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2020)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2020)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2021

pdf(paste0("Año-2021/Gráficas-ESP-ComparativaAjustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2021)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2021)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2022

pdf(paste0("Año-2022/Gráficas-ESP-ComparativaAjustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura 21.","Figura 22.","Figura 23.",
                            "Figura 24.","Figura 25.","Figura 26."),
                year.XX = 2022)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura 27.","Figura 28.","Figura 29.",
                            "Figura 30.","Figura 31.","Figura 32."),
                year.XX = 2022)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2023  

pdf(paste0("Año-2023/Gráficas-ESP-Ajustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2023)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2023)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2024

pdf(paste0("Año-2024/Gráficas-ESP-Ajustes", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.residencial.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.residencial.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención a domicilio",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2024)

evolucion.ESP.5(ESP1 = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP3 = df.domicilio.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                ESP4 = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                col2 = c("red","green","blue","yellow"),
                rango.edades = 35:100,
                ylimite = c(0,60),
                leyes = c("Helligman-Pollard","Gompertz",
                          "Gompertz-Makeham","Sin ajuste"),
                tipo.atencion = "Atención residencial",
                graf.XX = c("Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.",
                            "Figura X.X.","Figura X.X.","Figura X.X."),
                year.XX = 2024)

dev.off()

### AÑO 2025 - DATOS DEFUNCIONES NO DISPONIBLES

```

##### COMPARACIÓN CON EL INE

```{r}



### AÑO 2017

pdf(paste0("Año-2017/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2017[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2017[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2017[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2017[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2017.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2017.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2017.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2017.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2017[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2018

pdf(paste0("Año-2018/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2018[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2018[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2018[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2018[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2018.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2018.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2018.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2018.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2018[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


dev.off()


### AÑO 2019

pdf(paste0("Año-2019/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2019[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2019[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2019[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2019[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2019.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2019.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2019.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2019.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2019[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


dev.off()

### AÑO 2020

pdf(paste0("Año-2020/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2020[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2020[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2020[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2020[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2020.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2020.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2020.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2020.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
```
