```{r}
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2020[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


dev.off()

### AÑO 2021

pdf(paste0("Año-2021/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2021[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2021[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2021[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2021[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2021.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2021.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2021.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2021.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2021[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

dev.off()

### AÑO 2022


pdf(paste0("Año-2022/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2022[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2022[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2022[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2022[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2022.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2022.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2022.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2022.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2022[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

dev.off()


### AÑO 2023

pdf(paste0("Año-2023/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2023[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2023[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2023[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2023[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2023.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2023.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2023.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2023.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2023[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

dev.off()


### AÑO 2024

pdf(paste0("Año-2024/Gráficas-ESP-INE", ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow=c(2,1))

evolucion.ESP.6(EspBr = df.INE.2024[, c(10,11)], 
                Esp.HP = df.INE.2024[, c(8,9)],
                Esp.Gmp = df.INE.2024[, c(18,19)],
                Esp.GM = df.INE.2024[, c(28,29)],
                rango.edad = 0:115,
                rango.edad.Gmp.GM = 45:85,
                col = c("red","blue", "green", "orange", 
                        "darkgreen", "grey", "yellow", "pink"))

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,8,9)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"), 
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.1.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio", 
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.2.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.HP[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,10,11)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")


evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,18,19)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.Gmp[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,20,21)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.GM[, c(1, 20:25)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,28,29)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Ajustada")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.residencial.2024.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4","red"),
                  col2 = c("chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Residencial",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.3.2(ESP = df.domicilio.2024.GM[, c(1, 26:31)], 
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col1 = c("cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue","red"),
                  col2 = c("darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen","orange"),
                  Indtitl = "Atención Domicilio",
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

evolucion.ESP.4.2(ESP1 = df.residencial.2024.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP2 = df.domicilio.2024.GM[, c(1, 26:31)],
                  ESP.INE = df.INE.2024[, c(1,30,31)],
                  col = c("deepskyblue","deepskyblue3","deepskyblue4",
                          "chartreuse","chartreuse3","chartreuse4",
                          "cornflowerblue", "blue","darkblue",
                          "darkolivegreen1", "darkolivegreen3","darkolivegreen",
                          "red","orange"),
                  ylimite = c(0,100),
                  ley = "GOMPERTZ-MAKEHAM",
                  tipo.esp = "Bruta")

dev.off()

```
